title: Ability to enter text in bold?
excerpt: Is there a way to change the text in a cell to BOLD?

posts.author: AskQuestions (KarenHowell)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to change the text in a cell to BOLD?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there! This isn’t an option at the moment but you could use the Updates Section to edit text further for that item.

I hope this is helpful!
